message:
fix: restore broken article links and add dynamic star badges to Flywheel table

- Fix llm_introspective_compression link (was 404, restore to jeffreyemanuel.com)
- Fix hermann_grassmann_nature_of_abstractions link (was 404, restore to jeffreyemanuel.com)
- Convert Flywheel table Stars column from hardcoded numbers to dynamic shields.io badges

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
